NAVAREA XIX 46/19
1.RIGLIST CORRECT AT 311830 UTC MAY 2019
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N. EAST OF 5W

73-59.9N - 035-50.2E WEST HERCULES
65-59.3N - 007-44.4E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN
65-12.2N - 006-22.6  DEEPSEA BERGEN

NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METER SAFETY ZONE
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N. REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2.CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 43/19
